items.name: Neon Rainbow Phoenix
items.description: Your guardian phoenix follows you and protects you by shooting different color fireballs at your foes. Each hit does 25 damage!

items.name: Confetti Cannon
items.description: Shoot pure joy at your friends!

items.name: Soccer Ball
items.description: Perfect for kicking around with friends or a real match.

items.name: Sword of Light
items.description: "Who is more foolish, the child afraid of the dark or the man afraid of the light?"

items.name: Mackerel
items.description: Holy Mackerel! This fish smarts!

items.name: Cloak of the Undying
items.description: Adorn this cloak, and none shall stand in thou's way, m'lord.

items.name: Super Spy Drone
items.description: In the future everything will be delivered by drone. The future is now. Use the remote control to fly, 'Q' and 'E' to more up or down.

items.name: Navy Convertible
items.description: Get out of my game, and into my car! To drive use 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle headlights and 'H' to honk.

items.name: Attack Ocelot
items.description: "I've never seen an ocelot!" This ocelot companion follows you around and chases after enemies.

items.name: Frozen Halberd
items.description: A trail of ice follows the halberd's blade as you swing furiously at your enemy. A hit will set the other player on fire and does 40 damage, and encases your foe in ice.

items.name: Medusa Head
items.description: Turn your enemies to stone for 5 seconds with this frightning Medusa head.

items.name: Vine Staff
items.description: Creates a wall of vines around your character. Anyone attempting to get through the vines tends to get stuck.

items.name: Overseer's Axe
items.description: The Overseer has an endless arsenal of weapons, but the one weapon he knows he can always count on is his axe! Swing this at your foe to do up to 25 hit points of damage per hit. That's not enough for you?  Your foe will also encounter the wrath of an orb with a laser beam.

items.name: Arabian Knight Scimitar
items.description: "Son of infamy! Every bone in your body shall be broken if you continue to defy me!"

items.name: Azurewrath's Return
items.description: His Magnificence keeps this dagger in his boot for emergencies and it always comes back.

items.name: Gigantic Bat Wings
items.description: On leathery wings, you rule the night. Click to take flight and own the sky, using the 'W' 'A' 'S' and 'D' keys to move around.

items.name: Bundle of TNT
items.description: Industrially, TNT is synthesized in a three-step process. First, toluene is nitrated with a mixture of sulfuric and nitric acid to produce mono-nitrotoluene or MNT. The MNT is separated and then renitrated to dinitrotoluene or DNT. In the final step, the DNT is nitrated to trinitrotoluene or TNT using an anhydrous mixture of nitric acid and oleum. Nitric acid is consumed by the manufacturing process, but the diluted sulfuric acid can be reconcentrated and reused. Subsequent to nitration, TNT is stabilized by a process called sulphitation, where the crude TNT is treated with aqueous sodium sulfite solution in order to remove less stable isomers of TNT and other undesired reaction products. The rinse water from sulphitation is known as red water and is a significant pollutant and waste product of TNT manufacture.

items.name: Epic Golden Sword and Shield
items.description: Click to swing dealing 15 to 22 damage; double click to spin-dash at your opponent while on fire!

items.name: Xanwood Katana
items.description: Who ever heard of a wooden Katana? Click to swing; does 8 damage.

items.name: Dagger of Shattered Dimensions
items.description: At first stab, it appears to be an ordinary dagger. But one quick press of the 'Q' key proves it to be something quite different.  Something that shatters dimensions.  Particularly the dimension of time.

items.name: Rainbowrath: The Avenger
items.description: This magical rainbow unicorn blade will mean the end of all your foes. Click to swing the sword dealing 12 to 16 damage. Double tap the space bar to get wings to appear, which you can use to fly while swinging your sword!

items.name: Portable Justice
items.description: Keep your foes on lockdown!

items.name: Snowy Gravity Coil
items.description: As you walk, leave behind a trail of ice, and as you leap, the north wind gives you a boost the whole way, lifting you high and dropping you gently.

items.name: Apple Pie
items.description: I know banana cream is the traditional comedy throwing pie. I know that. But people don't eat banana cream pie for Thanksgiving, unless they work in a comedy factory and get them for free. Careful, the apples are hot!

items.name: Atomblaster 777
items.description: Send your enemies flying with an invisible blast of air!

items.name: Dance Potion
items.description: One sip gives you uncontrollable dance fever!

items.name: School's Out Launcher
items.description: Schools out- time to launch all your school items at your friends! Launch an apple, book, and diploma for your friends to interact with!

items.name: Hyperbike
items.description: Solar powered awesome motorbike.  Travel at hyperspeed and leave a trail of burning light behind you.

items.name: Artemis Bow
items.description: The Artemis Bow features two attack modes--you can charge a concentrated death shot that does up to 100 damage, or shoot in rapid fire mode for more arrows that deal 12 damage each.But that's not all - you can also use it to fly! When you jump, the Artemis Bow will grow wings and allow you to take flight.

items.name: Face Melting Guitar
items.description: This axe plays guitar solos so epic that they literally melt people's faces.
